benefits.description: Completely reversed shoulder reconstruction surgery. Went from zero range of motion and pain to full weight shoulder and chest presses. No gym activity brings pain or concern.
Full recovery of shoulder function and pain-free strength training.

protocol_notes: Wolverine stack protocol: BPC-157 500mcg daily injected directly into shoulder injury site (subcutaneous), TB-500 3x weekly into abdomen (subcutaneous). User emphasizes localized injection at injury site for BPC due to shorter half-life. Cites Dr. Hyman and Trevor Bachmeyer podcasts on rationale. Completely avoided shoulder reconstruction surgery.
